results.rendered_html:
vaptṛ m. [vap-tṛc]
1 A sower (of seed), planter, husbandman; na śāleḥ staṃbakaritā vapturguṇamapekṣate  Mu. 1. 3 ,  Ms. 3. 142. 
2 A father, procreator.
3 A poet, an inspired sage.
4 A shaver, cutter.
